---
name: Feature request (English)
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Somtoday Mod
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A short description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / motivation
What problem does this solve, or what need does it address?

## Proposed solution
Describe how you envision the feature working.

## Alternatives considered
Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, what are they and why did you prefer your proposed solution?

## Affected platforms
- [ ] Chromium
- [ ] Firefox
- [ ] Android
- [ ] Userscript
- [ ] All

## Additional context
Any other context, mockups, or examples that might be helpful.
